current_live_posture.summary: Fresh 2026-06-09 target-run evidence now shows both Codex target runs and the Claude workload probe at native_attach/ready. Keep stronger live-host claims tied to fresh evidence, and keep separate host snapshot attention from this recovered live target-run posture.
